# pi-extensions

> Monorepo of pi (terminal coding agent) extensions. npm org @pi-extensions. Primary package: Pac-Man working/thinking indicator.

## Docs

- [Documentation index](docs/README.md)
- [Quickstart](docs/quickstart.md)
- [Install](docs/install/README.md)
- [Commands](docs/usage/commands.md)
- [Looks](docs/usage/looks.md)
- [Persistence](docs/usage/persistence.md)
- [Development](docs/development.md)
- [Releases](docs/releases.md)
- [Architecture overview](docs/architecture.md)

## Packages

- [pi-pacman](packages/pi-pacman/README.md) — npm `@pi-extensions/pi-pacman`
